description.ko: 순수한 빛의 줄기가 유리 프리즘을 통해 선명한 무지개색으로 갈라지는 물리적 현상을 정교한 빛의 놀이와 함께 시각화한 작품입니다.
description.en: A stunning visual representation of light physics, showing a pure beam of light splitting into a vivid rainbow through a glass prism with intricate light play.

prompt: Close-up of a high-quality crystal prism refracting a single beam of white light into a vibrant, multi-colored spectrum. Sharp caustic light patterns on a clean white surface, cinematic lighting, macro photography, 8k resolution, photorealistic, subtle chromatic aberration, ethereal atmosphere.
